description: Field-exposure policy for ITSM entity records returned by UC tool handlers. Each field carries a data classification; a handler returns a field to the model only when its classification ranks below the withhold threshold. Fields not listed default to 'internal' (exposable). This is registry data — marking a new field sensitive is a one-line edit here, never a code change (Component Spec C1, C12).

internal_content.description: Record arrays whose items carry a per-item visibility flag. An item is internal unless its flag is true; internal items are returned only to a privileged (staff) role. An end-user or unrecognised role sees only public items. Default-deny — a role must be listed in privileged_roles to see internal content.

kb_audience.description: Knowledge-base article audiences. 'end_user_visible' audiences are returned to any role; 'privileged_only' audiences are returned only to a privileged (staff) role — the same privileged_roles list as internal_content. Default-deny: an unrecognised role sees only end_user_visible audiences.
